title: Raw Ore to Blocks - Create Add-on
description: Add-on for my ROtB datapack that adds support for Create Mod
body:
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/nE5Ewe4j?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1301458?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=blueviolet) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/nE5Ewe4j?style=for-the-badge&label=Latest%20release&color=chartreuse) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/AI-AI?style=for-the-badge&label=Never%20by&color=red) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord%20server%20-%20Discord?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Join%20the&color=royalblue&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FDGVD6wBTDF)](https://discord.gg/DGVD6wBTDF)
## IMPORTANT This add-on should be above the main Raw Ore to Blocks datapack on the list in the game to ensure that everything loads correctly. ## About datapack This is an add-on for my [Raw Ore to Blocks](https://modrinth.com/datapack/raw-ore-to-blocks) (ROtB) datapack. This datapack allows you to smelt **Raw Ore Block** into **Smelted Ore Blocks**. For more information about the main datapack, visit it's project page. This add-on adds support for `zinc` from Create Mod. That means that both ROtB and Create are required to use this addon. ## Recipe and advancement This add-on introduces additional recipe and advancement. Recipe allows you to smelt and blast `raw zinc block` onto `zinc block` saving a bit of fuel and time. Advancement rewards player with some additional experience points for using the recipe for the first time. ## Translations Translations are embeded with the base datapack / mod, wchich is a reqiured dependency for this addon. Modrinth App should download it automatically for you if you're downloading the mod version. Datapack / mod supports following languages: English Polish ## Future add-on support I plan on updating this addon once new **major** Create update or when I change something in the main datapack. If I miss some Create update, let me know on the [Support Discord](https://discord.gg/DGVD6wBTDF).
